rationale: Educ. Code §29.151 mandates kindergarten establishment and is unrelated to property tax homestead exemption amounts. No operational or fiscal linkage exists between the two provisions.
quote: The board of trustees of each school district shall establish and maintain one or more kindergartens for the training of children residing in the district who are at least five years of age on September 1 of the school year.
_note: No conflict; rule_text concerns kindergarten requirements, not property tax exemptions.
